title: Verification, operations and user documentation
objective: Add focused tests and operator/user documentation for stage 1 notifications.
non_goals: Do not archive the workflow before owner acceptance.
Do not claim background notification support for closed browsers in stage 1.
Do not skip e2e for the main user path unless the environment lacks browser permissions support.
requirements: User docs must explain browser permission recovery.
Deployment docs must explain HTTPS and service worker cache requirements.
Tests must cover permission denied fallback.
Tests must cover access isolation between users.
Final report must state exactly which checks ran and which were not possible.
acceptance_checks: User guide describes enable, disable, denied permission and closed-browser limitations.
Deployment guide describes HTTPS/service worker requirements.
E2E verifies notification center and browser permission flow.
Acceptance report records residual risk for unsupported browser behavior.
